name: Warm Hammock, Cage Hanging Hammock 23cm / 9.1in with Hanging Hooks for Bird for Hamsters(#1)
description: Feature:1. Warm Nest: The soft plush hammock can give your lovely or bird a warm and comfortable place to rest.2. Foldable and Portable: This comfortable warm hammock can be folded for easy storage. Easy to carry when traveling.3. Hanging Hooks: There are hooks on the top of this hammock for easy hanging on the bird cage, help you save space.4. Easy to Clean: A good place for pets to sleep and rest. Can be used as a toy for them to play, swing or hide in caves.5. Wide Applications: Warm hammock is suitable for parrots, hamsters, sugar gliders, golden hamster and other animals.Specification:Ite
